name: PAY_VALUE_GROUPS_VL
query: SELECT pvg.VALUE_GROUP_ID VALUE_GROUP_ID, pvg.BASE_VALUE_GROUP_ID BASE_VALUE_GROUP_ID, pvg.BASE_NAME BASE_NAME, pvg.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, pvg.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE, pvg.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, pvg.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, pvgtl.NAME NAME, pvg.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, pvg.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, pvg.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, pvg.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, pvg.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, pvg.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, pvg.SEED_STATUS SEED_STATUS FROM PAY_VALUE_GROUPS pvg, PAY_VALUE_GROUPS_TL pvgtl WHERE pvg.VALUE_GROUP_ID = pvgtl.VALUE_GROUP_ID AND pvgtl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
